    Grid.ValueFormat
    Defines the different formats used to represent a cell's location on the grid.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    Grid.areAdjacent(short cellA, short cellB, Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Determines if two cells are adjacent to each other in the grid.
    static boolean
    Grid.canAffectFirstTrueCell(short firstTrueCell, short clickCell, Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Determines if a prospective click on a clickCell can affect or create a new first true cell in the grid.
    void
    Grid.click(short cell, Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Simulates a click on the Grid at the specified cell, supporting Grid.ValueFormat.Index or Grid.ValueFormat.PackedInt formats.
    static ShortList
    Grid.computeAdjacents(short cell, Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Convenience overload for Grid.computeAdjacents(short, ValueFormat, ValueFormat) that assumes the input and output formats are the same.
    static ShortList
    Grid.computeAdjacents(short cell, Grid.ValueFormat inputFormat, Grid.ValueFormat outputFormat)
    Computes the hexagonally adjacent cells for a given cell, supporting flexible input and output formats.
    void
    CombinationMessage.convertTo(Grid.ValueFormat outputFormat)
    Converts the internal combination list to the specified Grid.ValueFormat.
    static short[]
    Grid.findAdjacents(short cell, Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Convenience overload for Grid.findAdjacents(short, ValueFormat, ValueFormat) that assumes the input and output formats are the same.
    static short[]
    Grid.findAdjacents(short cell, Grid.ValueFormat inputFormat, Grid.ValueFormat outputFormat)
    Finds the hexagonally adjacent cells for a given cell, supporting flexible input and output formats.
    short[]
    Grid.findFirstTrueAdjacents(Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Returns an array of adjacent cells to the first true cell in the requested format.
    short[]
    Grid.findFirstTrueAdjacentsAfter(short cell, Grid.ValueFormat inputFormat, Grid.ValueFormat outputFormat)
    Returns an array of adjacent cells to the first true cell that have an index greater than the specified cell.
    short
    Grid.findFirstTrueCell(Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Scans the grid and returns the first true cell in the requested format.
    short[]
    Grid.findTrueCells(Grid.ValueFormat format)
    Scans the grid bitmask and returns an array of all true cells in the requested format.
    short[]
    CombinationMessage.getCombination(Grid.ValueFormat outputFormat)
    Returns the raw combination array, converting it to the specified format if necessary.

Performance-optimized brute-force solver for hexagonal grid Lights Out puzzles
